◎简　　介  

　　Ten budding stand-up comedians shortlisted through a nationwide hunt compete to become India's next big comic sensation. They are mentored and judged for their performances by Tanmay, Biswa, Kanan, Kenny, Sapan, Kaneez and Naveen. Hosted by Abish and Sumukhi, watch Comicstaan to find out who gets crowned as the future competition to some of these big names in stand-up comedy.
